data.name: Hentai Sexy Mom
data.detailed_description:
🍳 Hentai Sexy Mom isn’t just a puzzle game. It’s your personal fantasy about a seductive kitchen MILF who cooks only for those who’ve been very, very naughty.

She’s warm, caring, and dangerously tempting. There’s playful desire in her eyes, and the heat of a home kitchen in her touch. And if you truly deserve a taste, she’ll show you what she hides under her apron…

While she’s preparing her hot dishes, you’re uncovering her desires piece by piece — and it’s up to you to put them back together, step by step, fragment by fragment.
There’s no punishment here — only pleasure, soft breathing, and the sweet thrill of anticipation.


🔞 Game Features:

🍰 30 seductive levels — each puzzle reveals a new scene, hotter and more intimate than the last.
💋 30 achievements — from your first meeting to the full revelation of her secrets.
🖼️ Gallery of delights — save your favorite moments and return to them anytime.


In Hentai Sexy Mom, you set the pace of your pleasure:

💖 Easy mode — a gentle start, soft hints, the perfect warm-up before the main dish.
🔥 Medium mode — more details, more intrigue, more temptation.
💎 Hard mode — a true challenge for the persistent. Each fragment brings you closer to the climax.


Each level is a new flavor, a new fantasy, a new night when Hentai Sexy Mom comes only for you.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
